rows.label: tev072901_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072901_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Yin'tonam how the Orphe reproduce.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072901_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072901_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Yin'tonam about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072901_MSG0001
rows.name:
Over the last several thousand
years, we have propagated by
effectively dividing ourselves in two.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072901_MSG0002
rows.name:
But here on Mira, it has
become a bit...strange.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072901_MSG0003
rows.name:
Traditionally, we can divide for two or
three generations without seeing any
significant changes in our offspring.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072901_MSG0004
rows.name:
But now we're seeing a great deal of
individuation in a mere single generation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072901_MSG0005
rows.name:
We've even ended up birthing highly
unusual Orphe like Min'barac, who
lack even a shred of rationality.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072901_MSG0006
rows.name:
I don't know if this is the influence
of Mira or your city, but something
highly unusual is transpiring here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072901_MSG0009
rows.name:
Kan'tonam has joined BLADE? Fascinating.
He hardly seems like the type.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072901_MSG0010
rows.name:
A BLADE needs the recklessness to
face down foes without fear, yes?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072901_MSG0011
rows.name:
Kan'tonam has a stronger survival instinct
than anyone. He'll be racing off of the
front lines at the first sign of danger![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072901_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Yin'tonam about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072901_SEL1031
rows.name: Ask Yin'tonam about the Orphean mutations.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072901_MSG0013
rows.name:
Due to his strong flight instinct,
I didn't think Kan'tonam would
make for a very good BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072901_MSG0014
rows.name:
But it seems his penchant for
hasty retreats actually came in
handy during his last mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072901_MSG0015
rows.name:
Apparently the Union to which
Kan'tonam belongs, the Testament,
gathers fragments of the White Whale.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072901_MSG0016
rows.name:
I believe that I can make something of use to BLADE
from the pieces he brought back on his last mission.
I expect you'll be quite pleased with it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072901_MSG0019
rows.name:
Min'barac said he's going to
join BLADE with his group of
Bias and Ma-non acquaintances.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072901_MSG0020
rows.name:
I know that I have spoken disparagingly
of his level of competence before...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072901_MSG0021
rows.name:
But his associations with the
various residents of NLA seem
to have really changed him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072901_MSG0022
rows.name:
He still has a reckless streak, but the
steps he's taking to improve his
survivability are perhaps quite rational.[ST:wait ]
